entity.summary: Native Hydra Chain decentralized exchange with V2 and V3 trading surfaces, concentrated-liquidity infrastructure, residual protocol liquidity, and low but non-zero recent exchange activity.
entity.notes: Current first-party HydraGon DEX application domain remains reachable. DefiLlama identifies Hydra DEX as the native exchange of Hydra Chain and reports residual TVL and non-zero 30-day volume, but near-zero recent weekly activity and zero 24-hour volume in the reviewed snapshot. HEI therefore uses limited rather than active or dead status and consolidates V2/V3 discovery rows into one entity.

evidence.title: HydraGon DEX official application
evidence.notes: Current dedicated first-party HydraGon DEX application domain remains reachable and serves the JavaScript exchange interface.

evidence.title: Hydradex V3 metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies Hydra DEX as the native decentralized exchange of Hydra Chain and reports residual TVL, non-zero 30-day DEX volume, minimal 7-day activity, and zero 24-hour volume, supporting limited classification.

evidence.title: Hydradex V2 and V3 DEX discovery entries
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Hydra DEX V2 and V3 source rows; HEI consolidates versioned registry representations under one Hydra DEX entity.
